clips.title: The Noise
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, tense grade. A dim cluttered basement at night, a single bare bulb, shadows between old furniture. A person freezes at a sudden noise, eyes wide with fear, breath held, shoulders tight, slowly turning toward the dark. A person in home clothes. Cold low light, deep shadow, fearful expression, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Woods
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, eerie grade. A foggy forest at night, pale mist between black trees, a weak flashlight beam. A person stands frozen and afraid, clutching the light, eyes darting, backing away from something unseen. A person in an outdoor jacket. Cold moonlight, drifting fog, fearful expression, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Hallway
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, dread grade. A dim narrow hallway at night, a flickering light at the far end, doors ajar. A person presses back against the wall in fear, hands up, breathing fast, staring down the hall. A person in casual clothes. Cold flickering light, deep shadow, fearful expression, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Trapped
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, claustrophobic grade. The interior of a stalled elevator, cold overhead light, the emergency button glowing. A person presses against the wall, clutching a phone, face tight with fear and rising panic. A person in office attire. Cold hard light, tight space, fearful expression, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Corner
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, tense grade. A derelict abandoned building, broken windows, dust and debris, grey light. A person peers fearfully around a crumbling corner, wide-eyed, hesitant, ready to flee. A person in a worn jacket. Cold grey light, hard shadow, fearful expression, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Mirror
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, suspense grade. Inside a car at night on a deserted road, dashboard glow. A person glances fearfully at the rear-view mirror, eyes wide, gripping the wheel, fear dawning on their face. A person in a jacket. Cold dash light, deep night, fearful expression, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
